title: Happy Hour
description: Weekday happy hour — food and drink specials Monday through Friday, 4:00 – 7:00 PM. Dine in or grab a seat at the bar.
metaDescription: Monday happy hour at Twisted Bar & Grill in The Colony, TX — food and drink specials 4–7 PM near Grandscape.

title: Karaoke Night
imageAlt: Karaoke Night every Wednesday at Twisted Bar and Grill
description: It's a karaoke night every Wednesday — sing your heart out with music, food, drinks, and hookah. Hosted by Chynamanmusic.
weeklyBlurb: Sing your heart out with music, food, drinks, and hookah — hosted by Chynamanmusic.
metaDescription: Karaoke Night every Wednesday at Twisted Bar & Grill in The Colony, TX — 9 PM to 2 AM, hosted by Chynamanmusic. Free entry, full bar, hookah lounge.
landingIntro: Twisted turns up every Wednesday with karaoke hosted by Chynamanmusic — grab the mic, order drinks, and make midweek your favorite night of the week.

landingFeatures.title: Hosted by Chynamanmusic
landingFeatures.description: Professional karaoke hosting every Wednesday — all skill levels welcome. #SingYourHeartOut

landingFeatures.title: Happy Hour First
landingFeatures.description: Warm up with food and drink specials from 4–7 PM before karaoke kicks off at 9 PM.

landingFeatures.title: Full Bar & Hookah
landingFeatures.description: Cocktails, draft beer, wine, and premium hookah in our upscale lounge — open until 2 AM.

landingFeatures.title: Free Entry & Parking
landingFeatures.description: No cover charge. Plenty of parking at Cascades Court — walk in with your crew.

title: Ladies Lounge
imageAlt: Ladies Lounge every Thursday at Twisted Bar and Grill
description: Our weekly Thursday night with live DJ, drink specials, and the Ladies Lounge experience from 8 PM onwards.
weeklyBlurb: Live DJ, drink specials, and the Ladies Lounge experience — powered by S&W Productions.
metaDescription: Ladies Lounge every Thursday at Twisted Bar & Grill in The Colony, TX — live DJ, drink specials, and happy hour 4–7 PM.

presenter: Live band & DJ · Premium hookah · Lounge seating

metaDescription: Friday Nights at Twisted Bar & Grill in The Colony, TX — live band, DJ, premium hookah, 9 PM – 2 AM.

title: Paint & Sip Brunch
